features.path_conditions: Caller is in sleepable context (PM resume/suspend/probe/remove callbacks).
features.fit_test_reasoning: Delay-GFP variant: pattern is wrong-API selection rather than resource lifecycle. mdelay() busy-waits and is wasteful in sleepable contexts. The fit test for delay-gfp seeds asks whether a sleepable equivalent exists (msleep) and whether the enclosing context is provably non-atomic (PM callbacks, probe). Both hold here.
